summary: Retested PDF export fix on wizard-generated carousel (id 02662d36-45ad-4cf3-b2aa-d3502f327708). html2canvas-based renderSlideToDataUrl path works reliably across all scenarios. No 'PDF export failed' toast observed.

verified_flows.result: PASS - Dialog shows '3 of 5 selected'. Downloaded '...-3-slides.pdf' (437558 bytes). Toast: 'Exported 3-page PDF'.

verified_flows.result: PASS - All 5 slides re-selected, 5-page PDF downloaded (731064 bytes).
PASS - Downloaded '...-1.png' (133775 bytes) of active slide. SVG-foreignObject path still functions in this browser.

critical_code_review_comments: CreateEQEditor.jsx is 1665 lines - candidate for splitting (toolbar, drawers, PDF picker dialog, canvas renderer could be separate modules).
Dead code: elementToStaticHtml, panoramaSliceHtml, escapeAttr, safeUrl (~line 958+) are still present but unused after switch to html2canvas. Consider removing to reduce bundle size and confusion.

exportSlidePng (line 292) still uses the old SVG-foreignObject approach that was deemed unreliable for PDF - it happens to work here but may fail on complex slides with gradients/web-fonts (same failure mode PDF originally had). Recommend migrating PNG export to reuse renderSlideToDataUrl for consistency.
renderSlideToDataUrl uses fixed 150ms wait for React commit - could use flushSync or MutationObserver for robustness on slower machines.
Non-blocking: html2canvas 1.4.1 is an older library; consider migrating to modern-screenshot or html-to-image v1.11+ for better perf/CSS coverage, but current setup works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export via html2canvas is fully working. Existing wizard project '02662d36-45ad-4cf3-b2aa-d3502f327708' has 5 slides on Midnight palette and is reliable for PDF/PNG export testing. Slide checkbox testids follow pattern 'pdf-pick-{i}' (not 'pdf-pick-slide-{i}'). Dialog testid is 'pdf-picker-dialog'.
